rows.label: qev050603_MSG0001
rows.name:
You are strong... We are utterly defeated.
You have made us painfully aware of our own powerlessness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050603_MSG0002
rows.name:
Ah... Not only could we not protect our families,
but do we truly lack the strength
to exact our own vengeance...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050603_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev050603_SEL0011
rows.name: Point out the Sankesshu's lack of strength.

rows.label: qev050603_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev050603_SEL0021
rows.name: Praise the Sankesshu, telling them they were strong.

rows.label: qev050603_MSG0003
rows.name:
Yes... It seems there are certainly many things
we must learn from you...
But we must defeat the Queen Hastara...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050603_MSG0004
rows.name:
And yet, we could not surpass you...
Guh... But we must defeat the Queen Hastara...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050603_MSG0005
rows.name:
Ah... Brother!!
Isn't that the Mortal Hastara,
one of its minions?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050603_MSG0006
rows.name:
What!
To think they've started showing their faces
even in a place like this...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050603_MSG0007
rows.name:
Wh-What do we do, Brother?!
Our Dolls are heavily damaged from the battle just now.
We are in no condition to fight![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050603_MSG0009
rows.name:
...[ST:playername ].
Could I ask you to show us your strength once more?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050603_MSG0010
rows.name:
And... will you help us exact vengeance for our families
who were murdered by them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050603_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev050603_SEL0031
rows.name: Beat your chest and tell him to leave it to you.

rows.label: qev050603_JNK0040
rows.name: Cold

rows.label: qev050603_SEL0041
rows.name:
Emotionlessly declare that you are simply
going to complete your job.

rows.label: qev050603_MSG0011
rows.name:
Thank you...
Then, we will closely observe
your fiery combat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050603_MSG0012
rows.name:
I see...
Perhaps that kind of calm pragmatism
is exactly what we were lacking...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050603_MSG0013
rows.name:
Then, we shall observe...
how you conduct your work.
Please precisely annihilate them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050603_MSG0014
rows.name: ...Splendid work, [ST:playername ]-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050603_MSG0015
rows.name:
Let us return to the General for now.
There, allow us to carefully formulate
a joint strategy with you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050603_MSG0016
rows.name:
...It's an honor for me to fight alongside
a mighty warrior like you, too!
Sorry for all the stupid things I said before![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050603_MSG0017
rows.name:
Listen up!
Unlike my brothers, I haven't completely
acknowledged you yet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050603_MSG0018
rows.name:
It's true that you're strong!
But still, when it comes to that thing...
We have to settle the score ourselves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050603_MSG0019
rows.name:
That's why... I'll be the one to land
the finishing blow with my bullets!
Don't you dare get in my way![ST:wait ]
